positive: A stylized, symmetrical, geometric mural design of a mystical forest scene. The composition features sharply defined, silhouetted elements: towering crystalline trees, crescent moons, and stylized woodland fauna (deer, foxes) rendered in clean, thick-lined vector art style. The color palette should be restricted to deep emerald green, royal indigo blue, burnt orange, and stark white, using strong contrast for maximum visibility on fabric. The overall aesthetic should be reminiscent of modern Art Nouveau mixed with psychedelic mandalas, featuring ornate borders and celestial patterns. Perfect for centered, high-contrast apparel print, no gradients, clean edges, high detail, vector illustration.
